_doc: Maps finding text patterns to prescribed actions. First matching pattern wins. RULE: Nothing is 'won't fix'. Everything must be investigated, treated, or escalated.

actions.action: Create JE via sweep: DR Accounts Receivable / CR Revenue
actions.blocker: Entity switch must work (URL failed — try manual dropdown click)

actions.action: Inline rename during sweep station checks (S04, S07, S19, S40)
Rename IC transaction names during C03 check in sweep
Investigate: check if other IES envs have this route working. If IES-wide, escalate to Intuit with specific route + env details. If env-specific, check config
Investigate: WHY does this env have negative balances when others don't? Team creates bank data — check if bank feed/transactions need correction. Compare with working envs
Investigate per-route: which 404s are IES-wide vs env-specific? Document each route status across envs. Escalate confirmed platform gaps to Intuit
Fix CID mapping in account_configs.json and LATEST_SWEEP.json
Verify: is empty state truly expected for this entity type? Compare with other parent entities across envs. If abnormal, investigate data population
Conditional checks N/A for this dataset type. Validated
Fix content safety flags during sweep — rename/remove flagged content
Escalate to Intuit: request SE email removal. If no response, edit via QBO Settings > Company during sweep
Set correct business type via QBO Settings during sweep
Identify and mark duplicates as inactive via QBO list management
Create payments or adjust dates via sweep to reduce overdue rate
